title: Dewocke 4PCS Round Glass Soup Containers With Lids, 710ml Glass Meal Prep Containers, Round Heat Resistant Leak Proof Food Container, Meal Prep Containers Freezer Microwave Safe
features: Premium Borosilicate Glass: Our glass containers are crafted from high-quality, BPA-free, food-grade borosilicate glass. This material ensures a long-lasting shelf life and provides a clear view of the contents, maintaining the freshness and integrity of stored food.

Leak-Proof & Airtight Lid: Our round glass bowls feature a lockable lid with a snap lock and silicone seal, enhancing the leak-proof performance of our containers. This design prevents food from absorbing odors and preserves its original flavor, keeping your dining table and backpack clean.

Meets Daily Needs: With a capacity of 25 oz/710 ml, these containers are perfect for most daily food storage needs. They are ideal for meal prep in the kitchen and can hold soups, yogurt, salads, porridge, ice cream, fruits, snacks, sauces, stews, oats, vegetables, and more.

Microwave, Dishwasher, and Freezer Safe: The glass salad bowl is suitable for refrigeration, microwave heating, and dishwasher cleaning. It operates within a temperature range of -40℃ to 400℃. (Please open the lid before microwaving. Note that it is best to hand-wash the lids, as dishwasher heat may deform them.)

Versatile for Many Occasions: Whether you're preparing breakfast, yogurt meals, or diet recipes for lunch or dinner at work, school, or on the go, these storage containers make it easy to grab and go.
description: Product Description Specifications: Product: Round Glass Bowls with Microwave Heating Capability Material: Borosilicate Glass, Silicone, Plastic Capacity: 710 milliliters Quantity: 4PCS Shape: Round Lid Colors: Blue, Pink, Light Green, Dark Green Operating Temperature: -40°C to 400°C Meets Daily Needs: Suitable for holding soup, yogurt, salad, porridge, ice cream, fruit, snacks, sauces, stews, oatmeal, vegetables, etc. Usage Note: Please open the lid before heating in the microwave. Product Advantages: Borosilicate Glass Made from high borosilicate glass, these bowls are durable, heat-resistant, and safe for use in the microwave, ensuring long-lasting performance. Versatile Use With a capacity of 710 milliliters, these bowls are perfect for a variety of foods, from soups and salads to desserts and snacks, making them suitable for daily use. Versatile Storage The bowls are not only suitable for serving but also for storing food in the refrigerator or freezer, thanks to their durable and temperature-resistant design. Safe for Food Contact The materials used are safe for food contact, ensuring that your food remains free from harmful substances. Protective Lids The silicone and plastic lids help keep food fresh and prevent spills, making these bowls ideal for both storage and transport. Space-Saving Design The round shape and stackable design make these bowls easy to store when not in use, saving valuable kitchen space.
